posts.title: Chromaprint 1.6.0 released
posts.summary: New version adds FFmpeg 8.0 support, performance enhancements, and Linux ARM64 binary builds.

posts.title: AcoustID will stop accepting fingerprints without metadata
posts.summary: Policy change to halt submissions lacking metadata, as unidentified fingerprints comprised majority of database bloat.

posts.title: mbdata 27.1.0 released
posts.summary: Package update supporting latest MusicBrainz schema with automated database mirror initialization capabilities.

posts.title: Chromaprint 1.5.1 released
posts.summary: Binary-only release introducing Apple M1 CPU support.

posts.title: Data Exports Restored
posts.summary: Daily JSON data exports are now available after infrastructure incident.

posts.title: Postmortem of the March 2, 2021 outage
posts.summary: Analysis of major infrastructure failure causing complete service downtime.

posts.title: Chromaprint 1.5 released
posts.summary: Minor update with PostgreSQL integration improvements and bug fixes.

posts.title: Chromaprint 1.4 released
posts.summary: Significant release enabling streaming audio processing with partial fingerprint results.

posts.title: Chromaprint 1.3.2 released
posts.summary: Bug fix addressing crash on corrupted audio files.

posts.title: Chromaprint 1.3.1 released
posts.summary: Minor fixes for fingerprint length restrictions and library versioning.
